description: You are an urban planner preparing a general plan update for San Francisco. Classify the city's zones into 5 distinct neighborhood typologies based on built environment characteristics using the 'buildings' and 'parcels' data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. Create a fully executed Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/neighborhood_typology.ipynb using the 'UrbanSim (Python 3)' kernel. The analysis must use K-Means clustering (n_clusters=5, random_state=42) on standardized zone-level features, including average year built, total residential units, total non-residential square footage, average building square footage, and building count. Export the zone-level results (including zone_id, cluster, and all calculated features) to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_typologies.csv and save a bar chart of the cluster profiles to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/cluster_profiles.png.
